title: Huawei S220S-24LP4JX GIgabit PoE switch, 2x 2.5G SFP, 2x SFP+
description: Huawei S220S-24LP4JX is a manageable L2 switch equipped with 24x 1Gbit Ethernet with PoE+ support, 2x 2.5G SFP and 2x SFP+ ports . The total PoE budget is 195W . With its number of PoE Ethernet ports, it is suitable for less power-demanding powered devices, such as most standard IP cameras. It supports all common L2 features and extensive management options, including management via the Huawei eKit App , enabling cloud management. With the Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) service, the… The Huawei eKitEngine S220S series switches are L2 GE/10GE designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Advanced features, high reliability, extensive device management options, rack mounting, built-in 230V AC power supply, and fanless design enable use in various installation scenarios Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (4) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads
